_metadata.warning: Inter-operator agreement and rule-creation figures are produced by a deterministic simulator (ResolutionSimulator) using literature-based operator distributions. These are MODELED ESTIMATES, not measured human decisions. Do not cite as empirical evidence.

jurisprudence_growth.interpretation: Low rate indicates stable ontology; high rate may signal incomplete initial ruleset

methodology_note: Escalation counts derive from system logs (observed). Operator assignments and all agreement / rule-creation figures are produced by ResolutionSimulator using distributions from aviation/healthcare decision-making literature; they are simulated estimates, not measured. See _metadata.
